name: @amlhubs/mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) 2025-11-25 — LF AAIF specification typed as an AML metamodel: Server, Client, Transport (stdio | streamable-http | sse), Capabilities, Initialize/InitializeResult, JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope, Resource, Tool, Prompt, PromptMessage, Sampling, Logging, Roots, Completion, Elicitation, Authorization (OAuth2). Each MCP entity is surfaced as a CMOF-conformant Class with Property; closed enums as Enumeration; constraint shapes as Constraint with OpaqueExpression. Specializes UML 2.5.1 + MOF 2.5.1 metaclasses.
